content.text:
Everything looks correct. Let me also verify the VoiceOrb import is compatible — the component's `VoiceState` type is imported from `@/hooks/useVoiceEngine`, and the local page's `VoiceState` type is defined inline. Since TypeScript structural typing will match both (they share the same string literals including `thinking`, `listening`, `speaking`, `followup`, `error`, `dormant`), this will compile cleanly.

All four fixes are applied. Here's a summary of every change made:

**`page.tsx`**
- Added 3 imports: `OmegaMessage`, `ThinkingIndicator`, `VoiceOrb`
- `VoiceState` type updated: `processing` removed, `thinking | followup | error` added
- Particle field color maps extended with `followup` and `error` entries; `processing` key renamed to `thinking`
- Speed calculation in draw loop: `processing` → `thinking`
- `heardText: string | null` state added
- `sendMessage`: `setState('processing')` → `setState('thinking')`
- `handleSubmit`: guard condition updated to `'thinking'`
- `recognition.onresult`: calls `setHeardText(transcript.trim())` on interim; calls `setHeardText(null)` on final before send
- `recognition.onerror` and `onend`: both call `setHeardText(null)`
- Header: raw button+divs orb replaced with `<button><VoiceOrb voiceState={voiceState} size={120} /></button>`
- Status text: `'processing'` → `'thinking'`
- Messages map: omega messages → `<OmegaMessage key={i} text={msg.text} />`, user messages keep existing div structure
- `ThinkingIndicator` rendered when `voiceState === 'thinking' && !streamingText`
- Streaming div replaced with `<OmegaMessage text={streamingText} streaming />`
- `heardText` confirmation block added above `messagesEndRef`
- All three `disabled={voiceState === 'processing'}` → `'thinking'`

**`page.module.css`**
- `.heardText` and `.heardLabel` classes appended at end of file
